# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-stage Deployment Pipeline

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: 14
      - name: Install and Build
        run: npm install && npm run build
        env:
          CI: true
      - name: Create .tar.gz
        run: tar -czf build/app.tar.gz *
      - name: Upload Artifact (build)
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build-artifact
          path: build/app.tar.gz

  download:
    name: Download Artifacts
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Use Artifact (build) from previous job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build-artifact

  deploy:
    name: Deploy Artifacts
    needs: download
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Use Downloaded Artifact
        uses: actions/working-directory@v1
        with:
          name: downloaded-artifact
      - name: Extract .tar.gz
        run: tar -xzf ${{ github.workspace }}/downloaded-artifact/build/app.tar.gz
      - name: Run Deployment Scripts
        run: ./scripts/deploy.sh
